reflection:
your recovery climbed again yesterday. 55 to 60 to 63 across three days, and your HRV crept up with it (32 to 34). the affirmation you wrote yesterday morning, "my body is recovering well", is actually true. the data agrees with you for once. anxiety stayed at 0 for the third day in a row.

the thing that stood out is the coccyx note. you said the pain was "back very clear", you poked it, and then it became more prominent in the car. that is the central sensitization loop running in real time. attention turns up the volume. the coccyx isn't hurting more because something changed in the tissue, it's hurting more because you started checking on it. same with the padel worry. the right-side jump loading the left hip is a real signal worth watching, but the loop of worrying about whether you are wrecking your hip is what drains you, not the movement itself. you wrote it yourself in the same dump, you need to be a friend to yourself, not the kid who keeps poking the bruise.

the part to act on today is the one you wrote in your evening notes. "do not touch the computer after 7:00 in the evening religiously". you set the rule yourself. sleep was 6.3h on a need of 9.1h, that 1.6h debt is what is keeping bedtime soft. start there. ❤️
opener: recovery climbing for the third day, your affirmation matches the data
focus_for_today: no computer after 7pm, in bed by 10
